title: CSX Corp. Announces Date for Fourth Quarter Earnings Release and Earnings Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Dec. 21, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) will release fourth quarter financial and operating results after the market close on Wednesday, January 25, 2023. This will be followed by a conference call and live webcast hosted by the company's management team at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

title: Watch these rail stocks in 2023, says Evercore
text: An analyst firm has come out with some rail stocks to watch in 2023, now that concerns about a disruptive strike have ebbed. President Joe Biden signed a bill earlier this month imposing a deal on rail-freight workers.

title: Jim Cramer says he likes these 3 industrial stocks heading into 2023
text: Jim Cramer said Friday he likes Caterpillar, Illinois Tool Works and CSX heading into 2023.

title: Class I railroads earn environmental accolades
text: A number of Class I railroads have recently earned recognition for efforts to follow guidelines promoting environmental, social and governance (ESG) values. Rail technology provider Wabtec also received accolades for its battery-electric locomotives.

title: Biden's Intervention Averts Rail Strike: An Analysis
text: With the rail strike not materializing, the U.S. economy heaves a sigh of relief as a strike might have cost more than $2 billion a day.
